title: contextBlocks single-item injection is raw JSON — render_recursive must be called explicitly
description: Object-form context block entries { name, item, depth } inject the item as raw JSON wrapped in XML. The depth field is stored as metadata on the injected array element but render_recursive is NOT auto-applied. The template must explicitly call render_recursive(resolve(id), depth). This means the agent receives unrendered JSON rather than the formatted view that per-item macros produce.
actual_behavior: _requirements_item contains raw JSON wrapped in context_block XML. _requirements_depth contains the specified depth. The template author must call render_recursive to get macro-rendered output.
expected_behavior: The depth field should auto-trigger render_recursive during injection, producing the rendered view directly in _requirements_item. Or there should be an explicit flag to opt into auto-rendering.
workaround: Template author must call render_recursive(resolve(id), _requirements_depth) explicitly.
